item.summary: Lack of Assurance of Sterility; potential for leakage from the diaphragm port once the foil is removed. Product details: DEXTROSE INJECTION USP, 70%, 2000 mL bags, Rx only, Sterile, B. Braun Medical Inc., Bethlehem, PA 18018-3524, USA, NDC: 0264-7387-50.
